name: Cucumber and lamb’s lettuce salad
intro: salmon, or the pea, za’atar, and feta fritters, on this page, to mention just three.

ingredients.item: 1¼-inch/3cm piece of ginger,  nely grated (1 tbsp) rounded 1 tbsp plain yogurt flaked sea salt
baby cucumbers (or 1½ English cucumbers; 1 lb 2 oz/500g)

method: Take each cucumber and quarter lengthwise. Then cut each long quarter diagonally into ¼-inch/½ cm slices and place in a large bowl with the lamb’s lettuce, mint, and cilantro. Gently mix the cucumber and leaves with the dressing and spread in a large shallow bowl. Sprinkle with the nigella seeds and serve.
Watermelon, green apple, and lime salad
This is delicious as it is—it screams summer, it screams virtuous and it denitely screams delicious—but some roasted peanuts, pistachios, or cashews sprinkled on top also work as a nice addition.
